escalation.rationale: Iran war intensifies on day 21 with fresh Israeli strikes on Tehran, Iranian retaliation hitting West Jerusalem and Haifa, and expanded regional conflict involving Gulf states.

ticker_items: Israel launches new wave of strikes on Tehran after Netanyahu claims Iran 'decimated'
Iran strikes West Jerusalem and Haifa in retaliation - IRGC
US F-35 stealth fighter reportedly damaged during Iran mission
Gulf states face fresh Iranian attacks as conflict spreads regionally
Japan ready to help secure Hormuz Strait amid intensifying war

middle_east.description: Israel launched new wave of strikes targeting infrastructure of Iranian regime in Tehran.
Iranian military struck targets in West Jerusalem according to IRGC statement.
Iranian military struck targets in Haifa according to IRGC statement.

claimed_totals.claim: US military deaths in Iran war
Gulf states deaths in Iran war

middle_east.text: We are winning and Iran is being decimated
middle_east.speaker: Benjamin Netanyahu
middle_east.title: Israeli Prime Minister

middle_east.text: Trump says no ceasefire as Khamenei issues defiant message
middle_east.speaker: Donald Trump
middle_east.title: US President

observers.description: Prime Minister Takaichi told President Trump that Japan is ready to contribute to Strait of Hormuz safety while explaining Tokyo's legal constraints. Japan expressing readiness for 'appropriate' efforts to secure passage through the key waterway as Middle East conflict threatens to spin out of control.

Russia and Iran deepening military alliance with Moscow providing Iran advanced satellite imagery, drone upgrades and tactical battlefield insights. Intelligence-sharing enhances Tehran's precision strikes against US forces in Middle East, mirroring US support for Ukraine.

Denmark was reportedly ready to blow up Greenland runways if US invaded, with Danish soldiers sent to Arctic island in January also given blood supplies in case of combat. Reveals tensions over Greenland amid broader geopolitical shifts.

financial.notes: Oil prices fell from near-four-year highs as US and Israel sought to ease Iran war concerns, while emerging market stocks fluctuated ahead of weekend.

update_log.text: Al Jazeera reports Iran war day 21 with Trump rejecting ceasefire and Khamenei issuing defiant message
IRGC announces Iranian military struck targets in West Jerusalem and Haifa
IDF launches wave of strikes targeting Iranian regime infrastructure in Tehran
US F-35 stealth fighter reportedly sustained damage during Iran mission, made emergency landing
